description_long: This shotgun features a sleek, metallic body with a prominent cylindrical barrel and a black pistol grip handle. The receiver area is detailed with mechanical components, including a visible trigger and trigger guard, as well as a side-mounted metallic element that may serve as a heat shield or accessory rail. The barrel is relatively long and slender, with a thin tube running parallel beneath it, possibly for gas operation or as a magazine tube. The grip is ergonomically shaped and appears to be made of a textured, grippy material. The overall finish is a combination of matte and glossy metallic surfaces, with some darker and reddish accents on the handle and side components.
description: A metallic shotgun with a long barrel, black pistol grip, and detailed mechanical receiver, featuring both matte and glossy finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular barrel opening and the alignment of the under-barrel tube, with the grip and side components partially visible.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the full length of the barrel, the mechanical receiver, the black pistol grip, and the under-barrel tube.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the end of the grip and the back of the receiver, with the barrel extending away from the viewer.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the receiver's details, the trigger guard, and the reddish side component, with the barrel and grip clearly visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and slender with a parallel under-barrel tube; no ribbing or venting visible
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
